# Holo Forensics v0.1.4

## ✨ What's Changed

- Added Windows WMI repository collection support.
- Added host metadata to collection headers in the desktop collection workflow.
- Vendored the Artemis workspace in-repo to preserve offline Windows parsing fixes.
- Tightened CI and documentation parity around the expanded collection and parser surface.
- Removed warning noise from the vendored Artemis workspace for cleaner non-`yarax` UI builds.

## 🧪 Release Notes

- Compared with [v0.1.3](https://github.com/false00/holoForensics/releases/tag/v0.1.3), this release adds the WMI repository collector and host metadata in collection headers while moving the Artemis fork into the repository to preserve the offline Windows parsing path.
- The release also tightens CI and documentation parity, and includes a small follow-up cleanup that removes build warnings from the vendored Artemis code used by `cargo run -- ui`.
